productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Women White Handbag
description: Style Note Add a twist to your attire by carrying this fashionable bag from united colors of benetton. Stuff your essentials in and you're ready to step out in style! Product Details A white hand bag with a colourful floral print Two short brown leather straps One main compartment with two magnetic buttons closure with one zippered internal pocket and two open internal organiser pockets One internal clip attached to one side of the main compartment to hold your key, wallet etc. Material and Care 100% cotton exterior with 100% polyester lining Do not wash Wipe with clean damp cloth when necessary Size Height: 35 cm Width: 49 cm Depth: 15 cm
